name: Wizard Interception Observatory
description: Remember one marked familiar, shape its trajectory, track it through cover and portals, and lead a traveling net into a future intercept.
natural_language: Remember the marked familiar. Arm and place one lure to bend every trajectory, hold F long enough to spend meaningful freeze energy, release it, track the target through cover and a portal, then click where a traveling net will intercept it—not where it is now.

metadata.notes: Five related familiars move under fixed-point analytic physics. The UI and independent grader replay lure acceleration, finite freeze key holds, cover/portal transitions, twelve-tick projectile flight, decoy collisions, misses, and the actual target intersection.
